zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Reynell VIII於大約1395年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Walter Reynell VII42歲，母親Margaret Stighull22歲。他於大約1425年與Joan Walrond結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1475年2月25日享年81歲，埋葬在英國戴文奧維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Reynell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Reynold
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Anglo-Norman French and Middle English personal name Reinald, Reynaud (ancient Germanic Raginald, from ragin ‘counsel, decision’ + wald ‘rule, ruler’), first introduced to England by Scandinavian settlers in the Old Norse form Rögnvaldr (see Ronald ) and greatly reinforced after the Conquest by the Norman forms Reinald and Reynaud, which often appear Latinized as Reginaldus. The surname was later much confused with Raynor and Renard . The surname is occasionally also borne by Jews, in which case it presumably represents an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Reynell VIII was born about 1395, in Devon, England, his father, Walter Reynell VII, was 42 and his mother, Margaret Stighull, was 22. He married Joan Walrond about 1425. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 25 February 1475, at the age of 81, and was buried in Ogwell, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Reynell VIII est né environ 1395, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Walter Reynell VII, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Margaret Stighull, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Joan Walrond environ 1425. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 25 février 1475, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Ogwell, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Reynell VIII um 1395 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Reynell VII 42 und seine Mutter Margaret Stighull 22. Er hat um 1425 Joan Walrond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Februar 1475 im Alter von 81 Jahren und wurde in Ogwell, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Reynell VIII è nato il circa 1395 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, Walter Reynell VII, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Stighull, aveva 22 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Walter Reynell VIIIが約1395年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Walter Reynell VIIは42歳，母Margaret Stighullは22歳であった。約1425年にJoan Walrondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1475年2月25日に81歳で死去し，イギリスデボンオグウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Reynell VIII(이)가 대략 1395년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Reynell VII(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Stighull(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1425년 Joan Walrond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1475년 2월 25일 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 오그웰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Reynell VIII nasceu aproximadamente 1395, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Reynell VII, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Stighull, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Walrond aproximadamente 1425. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de fevereiro de 1475, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Ogwell, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Reynell VIII родился около 1395 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Reynell VII было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stighull, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Walrond около 1425 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 25 февраля 1475 г. в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности огвелл, девон, Англия.
